    G

    Game - Class in model
    Central class that manages the entire Monopoly game state.
    Game(Player[], Board) - Constructor for class model.Game
     
    GameController - Class in controller
    Main controller responsible for all core gameplay logic.
    GameController(Game, GameView) - Constructor for class controller.GameController
     
    GameEditorController - Class in controller
    Controller for the hidden Game Editor.
    GameEditorController(Game, GameController) - Constructor for class controller.GameEditorController
     
    GameEditorDialog - Class in view
    Hidden Game Editor dialog (Easter Egg).
    GameEditorDialog(JFrame, GameEditorController, Runnable) - Constructor for class view.GameEditorDialog
     
    GameView - Class in view
    The main graphical user interface for the Monopoly game.
    GameView() - Constructor for class view.GameView
     
    GameView.TradeRequest - Class in view

    GoSlot - Class in model
